ops.text: Fix 409 Conflict by swapping upload-artifact for download-artifact in test job

ops.find_block:
- name: Download APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: .
ops.replace_with:
- name: Download APK
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: artifact_drop

            --type robo \
            --app app-debug.apk \

- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |

            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
